name: Sales Enablement Workflow
description: Research a prospect, build a tailored pitch, and prepare supporting collateral for a sales engagement

inputs.name: prospect_name
inputs.description: Name of the target company or individual

inputs.name: product_or_solution
inputs.description: The product or solution being pitched

inputs.name: engagement_type
inputs.description: Type of engagement: discovery call, demo, proposal, or QBR

inputs.name: known_pain_points
inputs.description: Any known challenges or goals of the prospect

inputs.name: competitor_context
inputs.description: Competing solutions the prospect is considering

outputs.name: prospect_brief
outputs.description: One-page summary of the prospect: company background, key contacts, strategic priorities

outputs.name: tailored_pitch
outputs.description: Customised pitch narrative aligned to the prospect's pain points and goals

outputs.name: competitive_brief
outputs.description: Comparison of our solution against known competitors relevant to this prospect

outputs.name: discovery_questions
outputs.description: List of open-ended questions to uncover the prospect's needs during the call

steps: Confirm the prospect name, product being pitched, and engagement type with the user
Research the prospect: company overview, recent news, strategic priorities, key decision-makers

then: Map each pain point to specific product capabilities that address it
Build the pitch narrative around those value propositions
else: Infer likely pain points from the prospect's industry and size
Build a general-purpose pitch narrative with the most common value propositions

then: Prepare a competitive brief: where our solution wins, loses, and differentiates
Identify two or three proof points or case studies that reinforce our differentiation

steps: Draft 10 open-ended discovery questions tailored to the prospect's context
Assemble the full prospect brief, pitch narrative, and (if applicable) competitive brief
Present all materials to the user for review

then: Revise the requested sections and re-present the updated materials
